name: Sumatran Rhinoceros
conservationEfforts: Indonesia's Sumatran Rhino Sanctuary breeds captive individuals. Anti-poaching patrols protect remaining wild populations in Way Kambas and Bukit Barisan.
description: The smallest living rhinoceros and the only Asian rhino with two horns. Once widespread across Southeast Asia, it now survives in tiny fragmented populations on Sumatra and Borneo.
